profile.name: Priya Nair
profile.title: AI & Data Engineer
profile.bio: AI and Data Engineer with 6+ years designing large-scale data platforms and production ML systems. I build reliable pipelines, feature stores, and LLM-powered services that turn raw event data into real-time intelligence. Comfortable from Spark and Airflow orchestration to serving RAG applications behind low-latency APIs.
